revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:September 13 (old calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of September 13 (old calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦9月13日'''は[[旧暦]][[9月 (旧暦)|9月]]の13日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[天智天皇]]7年（[[668年]]_月_日） - [[唐 (王朝)|唐]]・[[新羅]]軍が[[高句麗]]を滅ぼし[[朝鮮半島]]を統一 * [[天正]]15年（[[1587年]]_月_日） - [[豊臣秀吉]]が大坂城から京都の[[聚楽第]]に移る
== 誕生日 == * [[享保]]18年（[[1733年]]_月_日） - [[杉田玄白]]、蘭方医『解体新書』（+ [[1817年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 == * [[十三夜]]
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[9月12日 (旧暦)|9月12日]] 翌日[[9月14日 (旧暦)|9月14日]] - 前月[[8月13日 (旧暦)|8月13日]] 翌月[[10月13日 (旧暦)|10月13日]] *新暦[[9月13日]]
{{msg:stub}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月13日'''は、[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の13日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[総章]]元年/[[文武王]]8年（[[ユリウス暦]][[668年]][[10月23日]]） - [[唐]]・[[新羅]]軍が[[高句麗]]を滅ぼし[[朝鮮半島]]を統一 * [[天正]]15年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1587年]][[10月14日]]） - [[豊臣秀吉]]が[[大坂城]]から京都の[[聚楽第]]に移る * [[慶長]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1600年]][[10月19日]]） − [[石垣原の戦い]] * 慶長14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1609年]][[10月10日]]） - [[前田利長]]が[[高岡城]]に入り、現在の[[富山県]][[高岡市]]が開町される。
== 誕生日 == * [[享保]]18年（グレゴリオ暦[[1733年]][[10月20日]]） - [[杉田玄白]]、蘭方医（+ [[1817年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1600年]][[10月9日]]） - [[吉弘統幸]]、[[武将]]（* [[1564年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 == * [[十三夜]]
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|12|9|14|8|13|10|9|0913}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:9月13日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]]

'''September 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar September}} ''September 13'''<!--Lunar September13--> is the Nth day of 、[[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の13日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]][[Category:先負]]である。
== Events == * [[総章]]元年/[[文武王]]8年（[[ユリウス暦]][[668年]][[10月23日]]） - [[唐]]・[[新羅]]軍が[[高句麗]]を滅ぼし[[朝鮮半島]]を統一 * [[天正]]15年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1587年]][[10月14日]]） - [[豊臣秀吉]]が[[大坂城]]から京都の[[聚楽第]]に移る * [[慶長]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1600年]][[10月19日]]） − [[石垣原の戦い]] * 慶長14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1609年]][[10月10日]]） - [[前田利長]]が[[高岡城]]に入り、現在の[[富山県]][[高岡市]]が開町される。
== Births == * [[享保]]18年（グレゴリオ暦[[1733年]][[10月20日]]） - [[杉田玄白]]、蘭方医（+ [[1817年]]）
== Deaths == * [[慶長]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1600年]][[10月9日]]） - [[吉弘統幸]]、[[武将]]（* [[1564年]]）
== Commemorations == * [[十三夜]]
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|12|9|14|8|13|10|9|0913}}

{{Lunar September}} '''September 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
<!--== {{Lunar September}} ''September 13'''<!--Lunar September13 is the Nth day of 、[[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の13日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]][[Category:先負]]である。
--> == Events == * [[総章]]元年/[[文武王]]8年（[[ユリウス暦]][[668年]][[10月23日]]） - [[唐]]・[[新羅]]軍が[[高句麗]]を滅ぼし[[朝鮮半島]]を統一 * [[天正]]15年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1587年]][[10月14日]]） - [[豊臣秀吉]]が[[大坂城]]から京都の[[聚楽第]]に移る * [[慶長]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1600年]][[10月19日]]） − [[石垣原の戦い]] * 慶長14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1609年]][[10月10日]]） - [[前田利長]]が[[高岡城]]に入り、現在の[[富山県]][[高岡市]]が開町される。
== Births == * [[享保]]18年（グレゴリオ暦[[1733年]][[10月20日]]） - [[杉田玄白]]、蘭方医（+ [[1817年]]）
== Deaths == * [[慶長]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1600年]][[10月9日]]） - [[吉弘統幸]]、[[武将]]（* [[1564年]]）
== Commemorations == * [[十三夜]]
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|12|9|14|8|13|10|9|0913}}

revision.text:
[[sn:September 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十三]] [[zh:九月十三]] [[en:draft:September 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章}} 1 / {{ill|Munmu of Silla|ja|文武王}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|668|ja|668年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}}) – The {{ill|Tang dynasty|ja|唐}} and {{ill|Silla|ja|新羅}} forces conquer {{ill|Goguryeo|ja|高句麗}}, unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島}}.
* {{ill|Tenshō (era)|ja|天正}} 15 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587|ja|1587年}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}}) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉}} moves from {{ill|Osaka Castle|ja|大坂城}} to {{ill|Jurakudai|ja|聚楽第}} in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|慶長}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}}) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1609|ja|1609年}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}}) – {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|ja|前田利長}} enters {{ill|Takaoka Castle|ja|高岡城}}, founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|高岡市}} in present-day {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県}}.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1733|ja|1733年}} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}) – {{ill|Sugita Genpaku|ja|杉田玄白}}, a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方}} physician (+ {{ill|1817|ja|1817年}}).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|慶長}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}}) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸}}, {{ill|samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1564|ja|1564年}}).
== Commemorations ==
* {{ill|Jūsan'ya|ja|十三夜}} (Thirteenth Night)
[[Category:Historical events in Japan]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Meiji period]] [[Category:Japanese samurai]] [[Category:Japanese emperors]] [[Category:Japanese scholars]] [[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:総章元年の出来事]]
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|12|9|14|8|13|10|9|0913}}

* Keichō 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1609|ja|1609年}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}}) – {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|ja|前田利長}} enters {{ill|Takaoka Castle|ja|高岡城}}, founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|高岡市}} in present-day {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県}}.

[[sn:September 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十三]] [[zh:九月十三]] [[en:draft:September 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章}} 1 / {{ill|Munmu of Silla|ja|文武王}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|668|ja|668年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}}) – The {{ill|Tang dynasty|ja|唐}} and {{ill|Silla|ja|新羅}} forces conquer {{ill|Goguryeo|ja|高句麗}}, unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島}}.
* {{ill|Tenshō (era)|ja|天正}} 15 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587|ja|1587年}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}}) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉}} moves from {{ill|Osaka Castle|ja|大坂城}} to {{ill|Jurakudai|ja|聚楽第}} in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|慶長}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}}) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1609|ja|1609年}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}}) – {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|ja|前田利長}} enters {{ill|Takaoka Castle|ja|高岡城}}, founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|高岡市}} in present-day {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県}}.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1733|ja|1733年}} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}) – {{ill|Sugita Genpaku|ja|杉田玄白}}, a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方}} physician (+ {{ill|1817|ja|1817年}}).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|慶長}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}}) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸}}, {{ill|samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1564|ja|1564年}}).
== Commemorations ==
* {{ill|Jūsan'ya|ja|十三夜}} (Thirteenth Night)

[[sn:September 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十三]] [[zh:九月十三]] [[en:draft:September 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章}} 1 / {{ill|Munmu of Silla|ja|文武王}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|668|ja|668年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – The {{ill|Tang dynasty|ja|唐}} and {{ill|Silla|ja|新羅}} forces conquer {{ill|Goguryeo|ja|高句麗}} , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島}} .
* {{ill|Tenshō (era)|ja|天正}} 15 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587|ja|1587年}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉}} moves from {{ill|Osaka Castle|ja|大坂城}} to {{ill|Jurakudai|ja|聚楽第}} in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1609|ja|1609年}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|ja|前田利長}} enters {{ill|Takaoka Castle|ja|高岡城}} , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|高岡市}} in present-day {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1733|ja|1733年}} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}} ) – {{ill|Sugita Genpaku|ja|杉田玄白}} , a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方}} physician (+ {{ill|1817|ja|1817年}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1564|ja|1564年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
* {{ill|Jūsan'ya|ja|十三夜}} (Thirteenth Night)

[[sn:September 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十三]] [[zh:九月十三]] [[en:draft:September 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章}} 1 / {{ill|Munmu of Silla|ja|文武王}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|668|ja|668年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – The {{ill|Tang dynasty|ja|唐}} and {{ill|Silla|ja|新羅}} forces conquer {{ill|Goguryeo|ja|高句麗}} , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島}} .
* {{ill|Tenshō (era)|ja|天正}} 15 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587|ja|1587年}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉}} moves from {{ill|Osaka Castle|ja|大坂城}} to {{ill|Jurakudai|ja|聚楽第}} in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1609|ja|1609年}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|ja|前田利長}} enters {{ill|Takaoka Castle|ja|高岡城}} , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|高岡市}} in present-day {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1733|ja|1733年}} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}} ) – {{ill|Sugita Genpaku|ja|杉田玄白}} , a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方}} physician (+ {{ill|1817|ja|1817年}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1564|ja|1564年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
* {{ill|Jūsan'ya|ja|十三夜}} (Thirteenth Night)

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}}" to "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}"
revision.text:
[[sn:September 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十三]] [[zh:九月十三]] [[en:draft:September 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章}} 1 / {{ill|Munmu of Silla|ja|文武王}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|668|ja|668年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – The {{ill|Tang dynasty|ja|唐}} and {{ill|Silla|ja|新羅}} forces conquer {{ill|Goguryeo|ja|高句麗}} , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島}} .
* {{ill|Tenshō (era)|ja|天正}} 15 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587|ja|1587年}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉}} moves from {{ill|Osaka Castle|ja|大坂城}} to {{ill|Jurakudai|ja|聚楽第}} in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1609|ja|1609年}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|ja|前田利長}} enters {{ill|Takaoka Castle|ja|高岡城}} , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|高岡市}} in present-day {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1733|ja|1733年}} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}} ) – {{ill|Sugita Genpaku|ja|杉田玄白}} , a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方}} physician (+ {{ill|1817|ja|1817年}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1564|ja|1564年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
* {{ill|Jūsan'ya|ja|十三夜}} (Thirteenth Night)
[[Category:Historical events in Japan]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Meiji period]] [[Category:Japanese samurai]] [[Category:Japanese emperors]] [[Category:Japanese scholars]] [[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:総章1st yearの出来事]]

[[sn:September 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十三]] [[zh:九月十三]] [[en:draft:September 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章}} 1 / {{ill|Munmu of Silla|ja|文武王}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|668|ja|668年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – The {{ill|Tang dynasty|ja|唐}} and {{ill|Silla|ja|新羅}} forces conquer {{ill|Goguryeo|ja|高句麗}} , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島}} .
* {{ill|Tenshō (era)|ja|天正}} 15 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587|ja|1587年}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉}} moves from {{ill|Osaka Castle|ja|大坂城}} to {{ill|Jurakudai|ja|聚楽第}} in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1609|ja|1609年}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|ja|前田利長}} enters {{ill|Takaoka Castle|ja|高岡城}} , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|高岡市}} in present-day {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1733|ja|1733年}} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}} ) – {{ill|Sugita Genpaku|ja|杉田玄白}} , a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方}} physician (+ {{ill|1817|ja|1817年}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1564|ja|1564年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
* {{ill|Jūsan'ya|ja|十三夜}} (Thirteenth Night)
[[Category:Historical events in Japan]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Meiji period]] [[Category:Japanese samurai]] [[Category:Japanese emperors]] [[Category:Japanese scholars]] [[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:総章1st yearの出来事]]

[[sn:September 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十三]] [[zh:九月十三]] [[en:draft:September 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章}} 1 / {{ill|Munmu of Silla|ja|文武王}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|668|ja|668年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – The {{ill|Tang dynasty|ja|唐}} and {{ill|Silla|ja|新羅}} forces conquer {{ill|Goguryeo|ja|高句麗}} , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島}} .
* {{ill|Tenshō (era)|ja|天正}} 15 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587|ja|1587年}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉}} moves from {{ill|Osaka Castle|ja|大坂城}} to {{ill|Jurakudai|ja|聚楽第}} in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1609|ja|1609年}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|ja|前田利長}} enters {{ill|Takaoka Castle|ja|高岡城}} , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|高岡市}} in present-day {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1733|ja|1733年}} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}} ) – {{ill|Sugita Genpaku|ja|杉田玄白}} , a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方}} physician (+ {{ill|1817|ja|1817年}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1564|ja|1564年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
* {{ill|Jūsan'ya|ja|十三夜}} (Thirteenth Night)
[[Category:Historical events in Japan]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Meiji period]] [[Category:Japanese samurai]] [[Category:Japanese emperors]] [[Category:Japanese scholars]] [[ja:総章1st yearの出来事]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:U Lunar Calendar Days]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[sn:September 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十三]] [[zh:九月十三]] [[en:draft:September 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章}} 1 / {{ill|Munmu of Silla|ja|文武王}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|668|ja|668年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – The {{ill|Tang dynasty|ja|唐}} and {{ill|Silla|ja|新羅}} forces conquer {{ill|Goguryeo|ja|高句麗}} , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島}} .
* {{ill|Tenshō (era)|ja|天正}} 15 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587|ja|1587年}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} moves from {{ill|Osaka Castle|ja|大坂城}} to {{ill|Jurakudai|ja|聚楽第}} in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1609|ja|1609年}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|ja|前田利長}} enters {{ill|Takaoka Castle|ja|高岡城}} , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City}} in present-day {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1733|ja|1733年}} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}} ) – {{ill|Sugita Genpaku|ja|杉田玄白}} , a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方}} physician (+ {{ill|1817|ja|1817年}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1564|ja|1564年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
* {{ill|Jūsan'ya|ja|十三夜}} (Thirteenth Night)
[[Category:Historical events in Japan]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Meiji period]] [[Category:Japanese samurai]] [[Category:Japanese emperors]] [[Category:Japanese scholars]] [[ja:総章1st yearの出来事]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|12|9|14|8|13|10|9|0913}}

revision.text:
[[sn:September 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十三]] [[zh:九月十三]] [[en:draft:September 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章}} 1 / {{ill|Munmu of Silla|ja|文武王}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|668|ja|668年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – The {{ill|Tang dynasty|ja|唐}} and {{ill|Silla|ja|新羅}} forces conquer {{ill|Goguryeo|ja|高句麗}} , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島}} .
* {{ill|Tenshō (era)|ja|天正}} 15 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587|ja|1587年}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} moves from {{ill|Osaka Castle|ja|大坂城}} to {{ill|Jurakudai|ja|聚楽第}} in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1609|ja|1609年}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|ja|前田利長}} enters {{ill|Takaoka Castle|ja|高岡城}} , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City}} in present-day {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1733|ja|1733年}} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}} ) – {{ill|Sugita Genpaku|ja|杉田玄白}} , a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方}} physician (+ {{ill|1817|ja|1817年}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1564|ja|1564年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
* {{ill|Jūsan'ya|ja|十三夜}} (Thirteenth Night)
[[Category:Historical events in Japan]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Meiji period]] [[Category:Japanese samurai]] [[Category:Japanese emperors]] [[Category:Japanese scholars]] [[ja:総章1st yearの出来事]]
== See Also! ==

[[sn:September 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十三]] [[zh:九月十三]] [[en:draft:September 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章}} 1 / {{ill|Munmu of Silla|ja|文武王}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|668|ja|668年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – The {{ill|Tang dynasty|ja|唐}} and {{ill|Silla|ja|新羅}} forces conquer {{ill|Goguryeo|ja|高句麗}} , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島}} .
* {{ill|Tenshō (era)|ja|天正}} 15 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587|ja|1587年}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} moves from {{ill|Osaka Castle|ja|大坂城}} to {{ill|Jurakudai|ja|聚楽第}} in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1609|ja|1609年}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|ja|前田利長}} enters {{ill|Takaoka Castle|ja|高岡城}} , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City}} in present-day {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1733|ja|1733rd year }} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}} ) – {{ill|Sugita Genpaku|ja|杉田玄白}} , a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方}} physician (+ {{ill|1817|ja|1817年}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1564|ja|1564th year }} ).
== Commemorations ==
* {{ill|Jūsan'ya|ja|十三夜}} (Thirteenth Night)

[[sn:September 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十三]] [[zh:九月十三]] [[en:draft:September 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章}} 1 / {{ill|Munmu of Silla|ja|文武王}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|668|ja|668th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – The {{ill|Tang dynasty|ja|唐}} and {{ill|Silla|ja|新羅}} forces conquer {{ill|Goguryeo|ja|高句麗}} , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島}} .
* {{ill|Tenshō (era)|ja|天正}} 15 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587|ja|1587th year }} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} moves from {{ill|Osaka Castle|ja|大坂城}} to {{ill|Jurakudai|ja|聚楽第}} in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1609|ja|1609th year }} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|ja|前田利長}} enters {{ill|Takaoka Castle|ja|高岡城}} , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City}} in present-day {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1733|ja|1733rd year }} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}} ) – {{ill|Sugita Genpaku|ja|杉田玄白}} , a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方}} physician (+ {{ill|1817|ja|1817th year }} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1564|ja|1564th year }} ).
== Commemorations ==
* {{ill|Jūsan'ya|ja|十三夜}} (Thirteenth Night)
[[Category:Historical events in Japan]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Meiji period]] [[Category:Japanese samurai]] [[Category:Japanese emperors]] [[Category:Japanese scholars]] [[ja:総章1st yearの出来事]] == See Also ==

[[sn:September 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十三]] [[zh:九月十三]] [[en:draft:September 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章}} 1 / {{ill|Munmu of Silla|ja|文武王}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|668|ja|668th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – The {{ill|Tang dynasty|ja|唐}} and {{ill|Silla|ja|新羅}} forces conquer {{ill|Goguryeo|ja|高句麗}} , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島}} .
* {{ill|Tenshō (era)|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 15 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587|ja|1587th year }} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} moves from {{ill|Osaka Castle|ja|大坂城}} to {{ill|Jurakudai|ja|聚楽第}} in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1609|ja|1609th year }} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|ja|前田利長}} enters {{ill|Takaoka Castle|ja|高岡城}} , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City}} in present-day {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1733|ja|1733rd year }} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}} ) – {{ill|Sugita Genpaku|ja|杉田玄白}} , a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方}} physician (+ {{ill|1817|ja|1817th year }} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1564|ja|1564th year }} ).
== Commemorations ==
* {{ill|Jūsan'ya|ja|十三夜}} (Thirteenth Night)
[[Category:Historical events in Japan]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Meiji period]] [[Category:Japanese samurai]] [[Category:Japanese emperors]] [[Category:Japanese scholars]] [[ja:総章1st yearの出来事]]

[[sn:September 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十三]] [[zh:九月十三]] [[en:draft:September 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章}} 1 / {{ill|Munmu of Silla|ja|文武王}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|668|ja|668th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – The {{ill|Tang dynasty|ja|唐}} and {{ill|Silla|ja|新羅}} forces conquer {{ill|Goguryeo|ja|高句麗}} , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島}} .
* {{ill|Tenshō (era)|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 15 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587|ja|1587th year }} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} moves from {{ill|Osaka Castle|ja|大坂城}} to {{ill|Jurakudai|ja|聚楽第}} in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1609|ja|1609th year }} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|ja|前田利長}} enters {{ill|Takaoka Castle|ja|高岡城}} , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City}} in present-day {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1733|ja|1733rd year }} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}} ) – {{ill|Sugita Genpaku|ja|杉田玄白}} , a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方}} physician (+ {{ill|1817|ja|1817th year }} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1564|ja|1564th year }} ).
== Commemorations ==
* {{ill|Jūsan'ya|ja|十三夜}} (Thirteenth Night)
[[Category:Historical events in Japan]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Meiji period]] [[Category:Japanese samurai]] [[Category:Japanese emperors]] [[Category:Japanese scholars]] [[ja:総章1st yearの出来事]]

[[sn:September 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十三]] [[zh:九月十三]] [[en:draft:September 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章}} 1 / {{ill|Munmu of Silla|ja|文武王}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|668|ja|668th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – The {{ill|Tang dynasty|ja|唐}} and {{ill|Silla|ja|新羅}} forces conquer {{ill|Goguryeo|ja|高句麗}} , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島}} .
* {{ill|Tenshō (era)|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 15 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587|ja|1587th year }} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} moves from {{ill|Osaka Castle|ja|大坂城}} to {{ill|Jurakudai|ja|聚楽第}} in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1609|ja|1609th year }} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|ja|前田利長}} enters {{ill|Takaoka Castle|ja|高岡城}} , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City}} in present-day {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1733|ja|1733rd year }} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}} ) – {{ill|Sugita Genpaku|ja|杉田玄白}} , a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方}} physician (+ {{ill|1817|ja|1817th year }} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1564|ja|1564th year }} ).
== Commemorations ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .

* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章}} 1 / {{ill|Munmu of Silla|ja|文武王}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|668|ja|668th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – The {{ill|Tang dynasty|ja|唐}} and {{ill|Silla|ja|新羅}} forces conquer {{ill|Goguryeo|ja|高句麗}} , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島}} .
* {{ill|Tenshō (era)|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 15 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1587|ja|1587th year }} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} moves from {{ill|Osaka Castle|ja|大坂城}} to {{ill|Jurakudai|ja|聚楽第}} in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1609|ja|1609th year }} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|ja|前田利長}} enters {{ill|Takaoka Castle|ja|高岡城}} , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City}} in present-day {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1733|ja|1733rd year }} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}} ) – {{ill|Sugita Genpaku|ja|杉田玄白}} , a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方}} physician (+ {{ill|1817|ja|1817th year }} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1564|ja|1564th year }} ).
== Commemorations ==
* {{ill|Jūsan'ya|ja|十三夜}} (Thirteenth Night)
== See Also ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 / {{ill|Munmu of Silla|ja|文武王|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|668|ja|668th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Tang dynasty|ja|唐|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Silla|ja|新羅|12=draft|12=draft}} forces conquer {{ill|Goguryeo|ja|高句麗|12=draft|12=draft}} , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島|12=draft|12=draft}} .
* {{ill|Tenshō (era)|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 15 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1587|ja|1587th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|12=draft|12=draft}} moves from {{ill|Osaka Castle|ja|大坂城|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Jurakudai|ja|聚楽第|12=draft|12=draft}} in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い|12=draft|12=draft}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1609|ja|1609th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|ja|前田利長|12=draft|12=draft}} enters {{ill|Takaoka Castle|ja|高岡城|12=draft|12=draft}} , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City|12=draft|12=draft}} in present-day {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births ==

* {{ill|Tenshō (era)|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 15 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1587|ja|1587th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} moves from {{ill|Osaka Castle|ja|大坂城|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Jurakudai|ja|聚楽第|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1609|ja|1609th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|ja|前田利長|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} enters {{ill|Takaoka Castle|ja|高岡城|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} in present-day {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .

[[sn:September 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 13일]] [[ja:9月13日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:九月十三]] [[en:draft:September 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ja:総章1st yearの出来事]] [[ar:September 13 (Lunisolar)]]

[[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:September 13 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:September 13 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:September 13 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:September 13 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:September 13 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:September 13 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-yue:九月十三]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 / {{ill|Munmu of Silla|ja|文武王|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|668|ja|668th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Tang dynasty|ja|唐|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Silla|ja|新羅|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} forces conquer {{ill|Goguryeo|ja|高句麗|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
* {{ill|Tenshō (era)|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 15 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1587|ja|1587th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} moves from {{ill|Osaka Castle|ja|大坂城|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Jurakudai|ja|聚楽第|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1609|ja|1609th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|ja|前田利長|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} enters {{ill|Takaoka Castle|ja|高岡城|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} in present-day {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1733|ja|1733rd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Sugita Genpaku|ja|杉田玄白|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} physician (+ {{ill|1817|ja|1817th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1564|ja|1564th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations ==
* {{ill|Jūsan'ya|ja|十三夜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (Thirteenth Night)

revision.text:
{{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 1 / {{ill|Munmu of Silla|ja|文武王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|668|ja|668th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – The {{ill|Tang dynasty|ja|唐|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} and {{ill|Silla|ja|新羅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} forces conquer {{ill|Goguryeo|ja|高句麗|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} .
* {{ill|Tenshō (era)|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 15 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|1587|ja|1587th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} moves from {{ill|Osaka Castle|ja|大坂城|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} to {{ill|Jurakudai|ja|聚楽第|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1609|ja|1609th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|ja|前田利長|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} enters {{ill|Takaoka Castle|ja|高岡城|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} in present-day {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1733|ja|1733rd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Sugita Genpaku|ja|杉田玄白|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} physician (+ {{ill|1817|ja|1817th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (* {{ill|1564|ja|1564th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
== Commemorations ==
* {{ill|Jūsan'ya|ja|十三夜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (Thirteenth Night)
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|12|9|14|8|13|10|9|0913|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} {{draft categories|

{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 1 / {{ill|Munmu of Silla|ja|文武王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|668|ja|668th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – The {{ill|Tang dynasty|ja|唐|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} and {{ill|Silla|ja|新羅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} forces conquer {{ill|Goguryeo|ja|高句麗|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} .

* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1609|ja|1609th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|ja|前田利長|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} enters {{ill|Takaoka Castle|ja|高岡城|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} in present-day {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} .

{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 1 / {{ill|Munmu of Silla|ja|文武王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|668|ja|668th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – The {{ill|Tang dynasty|ja|唐|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} and {{ill|Silla|ja|新羅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} forces conquer {{ill|Goguryeo|ja|高句麗|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} .
* {{ill|Tenshō (era)|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 15 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|1587|ja|1587th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} moves from {{ill|Osaka Castle|ja|大坂城|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} to {{ill|Jurakudai|ja|聚楽第|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1609|ja|1609th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|ja|前田利長|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} enters {{ill|Takaoka Castle|ja|高岡城|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} in present-day {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1733|ja|1733rd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Sugita Genpaku|ja|杉田玄白|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} physician (+ {{ill|1817|ja|1817th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (* {{ill|1564|ja|1564th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
== Commemorations ==
* {{ill|Jūsan'ya|ja|十三夜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (Thirteenth Night)
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|12|9|14|8|13|10|9|0913|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zongzhang (era)|qq=}} 1 / {{ill|Munmu of Silla|ja|文武王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Munmu of Silla|qq=}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Julian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Julian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|668|ja|668th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/668|qq=}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 23|qq=}} ) – The {{ill|Tang dynasty|ja|唐|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tang dynasty|qq=}} and {{ill|Silla|ja|新羅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Silla|qq=}} forces conquer {{ill|Goguryeo|ja|高句麗|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goguryeo|qq=}} , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Korean Peninsula|qq=}} .
* {{ill|Tenshō (era)|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshō (era)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qq=}} 15 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|1587|ja|1587th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1587|qq=}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 14|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=}} moves from {{ill|Osaka Castle|ja|大坂城|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Castle|qq=}} to {{ill|Jurakudai|ja|聚楽第|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurakudai|qq=}} in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō (era)|qq=}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1600|qq=}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 19|qq=}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Battle of Ishigakibaru|qq=}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1609|ja|1609th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1609|qq=}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 10|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|ja|前田利長|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maeda Toshinaga|qq=}} enters {{ill|Takaoka Castle|ja|高岡城|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takaoka Castle|qq=}} , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takaoka, Toyama|qq=}} in present-day {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyama Prefecture|qq=}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|Kyōhō (era)|ja|享保|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōhō (era)|qq=}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1733|ja|1733rd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1733|qq=}} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 20|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Sugita Genpaku|ja|杉田玄白|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugita Genpaku|qq=}} , a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rangaku|qq=}} physician (+ {{ill|1817|ja|1817th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1817|qq=}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō (era)|qq=}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1600|qq=}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 9|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshihiro Muneyuki|qq=}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|qq=}} (* {{ill|1564|ja|1564th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1564|qq=}} ).
== Commemorations ==
* {{ill|Jūsan'ya|ja|十三夜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūsan'ya|qq=}} (Thirteenth Night)

{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zongzhang (era)|qq=}} 1 / [[:en:Munmu of Silla|Munmu of Silla]] 8 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:668|668]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The [[:en:Tang dynasty|Tang dynasty]] and [[:en:Silla|Silla]] forces conquer [[:en:Goguryeo|Goguryeo]] , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Korean Peninsula|qq=}} .
* [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ) – [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] moves from [[:en:Osaka Castle|Osaka Castle]] to [[:en:Jurakudai|Jurakudai]] in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō (era)|qq=}} 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]] ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Battle of Ishigakibaru|qq=}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian [[:en:1609|1609]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ) – [[:en:Maeda Toshinaga|Maeda Toshinaga]] enters [[:en:Takaoka Castle|Takaoka Castle]] , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takaoka, Toyama|qq=}} in present-day [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]] .
== Births ==
* [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō (era)]] 18 (Gregorian [[:en:1733|1733]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ) – [[:en:Sugita Genpaku|Sugita Genpaku]] , a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rangaku|qq=}} physician (+ [[:en:1817|1817]] ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō (era)|qq=}} 5 (Julian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshihiro Muneyuki|qq=}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|qq=}} (* [[:en:1564|1564]] ).
== Commemorations ==
* {{ill|Jūsan'ya|ja|十三夜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūsan'ya|qq=}} (Thirteenth Night)
== See Also ==

{{Not to be confused with|September 13 (Lunisolar)}}<!--hatnote--> {{Not to be confused with|September 13}}<!--hatnote--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zongzhang (era)|qq=}} 1 / [[:en:Munmu of Silla|Munmu of Silla]] 8 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:668|668]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The [[:en:Tang dynasty|Tang dynasty]] and [[:en:Silla|Silla]] forces conquer [[:en:Goguryeo|Goguryeo]] , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Korean Peninsula|qq=}} .
* [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ) – [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] moves from [[:en:Osaka Castle|Osaka Castle]] to [[:en:Jurakudai|Jurakudai]] in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Keichō (era)|ja|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō (era)|qq=}} 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]] ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Battle of Ishigakibaru|qq=}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian [[:en:1609|1609]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ) – [[:en:Maeda Toshinaga|Maeda Toshinaga]] enters [[:en:Takaoka Castle|Takaoka Castle]] , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takaoka, Toyama|qq=}} in present-day [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]] .

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|September 13|qq=September 13}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zongzhang (era)|qq=}} 1 / [[:en:Munmu of Silla|Munmu of Silla]] 8 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:668|668]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The [[:en:Tang dynasty|Tang dynasty]] and [[:en:Silla|Silla]] forces conquer [[:en:Goguryeo|Goguryeo]] , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Korean Peninsula|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} .
* [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ) – [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] moves from [[:en:Osaka Castle|Osaka Castle]] to [[:en:Jurakudai|Jurakudai]] in Kyoto.
* [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]] ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Battle of Ishigakibaru|qq=}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian [[:en:1609|1609]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ) – [[:en:Maeda Toshinaga|Maeda Toshinaga]] enters [[:en:Takaoka Castle|Takaoka Castle]] , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takaoka, Toyama|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in present-day [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]] .
== Births ==
* [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō (era)]] 18 (Gregorian [[:en:1733|1733]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ) – [[:en:Sugita Genpaku|Sugita Genpaku]] , a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rangaku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 蘭方医学}} physician (+ [[:en:1817|1817]] ).
== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Julian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshihiro Muneyuki|qq=}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|qq=}} (* [[:en:1564|1564]] ).
== Commemorations ==

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840131]] Wikidata name: 13th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 13|qq=September 13}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zongzhang (era)|qq=}} 1 / [[:en:Munmu of Silla|Munmu of Silla]] 8 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:668|668]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The [[:en:Tang dynasty|Tang dynasty]] and [[:en:Silla|Silla]] forces conquer [[:en:Goguryeo|Goguryeo]] , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Korean Peninsula|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} .
* [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ) – [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] moves from [[:en:Osaka Castle|Osaka Castle]] to [[:en:Jurakudai|Jurakudai]] in Kyoto.
* [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]] ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Battle of Ishigakibaru|qq=}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian [[:en:1609|1609]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ) – [[:en:Maeda Toshinaga|Maeda Toshinaga]] enters [[:en:Takaoka Castle|Takaoka Castle]] , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takaoka, Toyama|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in present-day [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]] .
== Births ==
* [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō (era)]] 18 (Gregorian [[:en:1733|1733]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ) – [[:en:Sugita Genpaku|Sugita Genpaku]] , a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rangaku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 蘭方医学}} physician (+ [[:en:1817|1817]] ).
== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Julian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshihiro Muneyuki|qq=}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|qq=}} (* [[:en:1564|1564]] ).
== Commemorations ==
* {{ill|Jūsan'ya|ja|十三夜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūsan'ya|qq=}} (Thirteenth Night)
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|12|9|14|8|13|10|9|0913|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840131]] Wikidata name: 13th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 13|qq=September 13}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zongzhang (era)|qq=|1=Zongzhang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5154353}} 1 / [[:en:Munmu of Silla|Munmu of Silla]] 8 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:668|668]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The [[:en:Tang dynasty|Tang dynasty]] and [[:en:Silla|Silla]] forces conquer [[:en:Goguryeo|Goguryeo]] , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Korean Peninsula|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Korean Peninsula|WD=Q483134}} .
* [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ) – [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] moves from [[:en:Osaka Castle|Osaka Castle]] to [[:en:Jurakudai|Jurakudai]] in Kyoto.
* [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]] ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Battle of Ishigakibaru|qq=|1=Battle of Ishigakibaru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585393}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian [[:en:1609|1609]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ) – [[:en:Maeda Toshinaga|Maeda Toshinaga]] enters [[:en:Takaoka Castle|Takaoka Castle]] , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takaoka, Toyama|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in present-day [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]] .
== Births ==
* [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō (era)]] 18 (Gregorian [[:en:1733|1733]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ) – [[:en:Sugita Genpaku|Sugita Genpaku]] , a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rangaku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 蘭方医学|1=Rampō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11625254}} physician (+ [[:en:1817|1817]] ).
== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Julian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshihiro Muneyuki|qq=|1=Yoshihiro Muneyuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10917146}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1564|1564]] ).
== Commemorations ==
* {{ill|Jūsan'ya|ja|十三夜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūsan'ya|qq=|1=Thirteenth Night|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18988720}} (Thirteenth Night)

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zongzhang (era)|qq=|1=Zongzhang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5154353}} 1 / [[:en:Munmu of Silla|Munmu of Silla]] 8 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:668|668]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The [[:en:Tang dynasty|Tang dynasty]] and [[:en:Silla|Silla]] forces conquer [[:en:Goguryeo|Goguryeo]] , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Korean Peninsula|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Korean Peninsula|WD=Q483134}} .
* [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ) – [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] moves from [[:en:Osaka Castle|Osaka Castle]] to [[:en:Jurakudai|Jurakudai]] in Kyoto.
* [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]] ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Battle of Ishigakibaru|qq=|1=Battle of Ishigakibaru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585393}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian [[:en:1609|1609]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ) – [[:en:Maeda Toshinaga|Maeda Toshinaga]] enters [[:en:Takaoka Castle|Takaoka Castle]] , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takaoka, Toyama|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in present-day [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]] .
