<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十三]][[zh:九月十三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840131]] Wikidata name: 13th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 13|qq=September 13}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zongzhang (era)|1=Zongzhang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5154353}} 1 / [[:en:Munmu of Silla|Munmu of Silla]] 8 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:668|668]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The [[:en:Tang dynasty|Tang dynasty]] and [[:en:Silla|Silla]] forces conquer [[:en:Goguryeo|Goguryeo]] , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Korean Peninsula|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Korean Peninsula|WD=Q483134}} .
* [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ) – [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] moves from [[:en:Osaka Castle|Osaka Castle]] to [[:en:Jurakudai|Jurakudai]] in Kyoto.
* [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]] ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Battle of Ishigakibaru|1=Battle of Ishigakibaru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585393}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian [[:en:1609|1609]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ) – [[:en:Maeda Toshinaga|Maeda Toshinaga]] enters [[:en:Takaoka Castle|Takaoka Castle]] , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takaoka, Toyama|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in present-day [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]] .
== Births ==
* [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō (era)]] 18 (Gregorian [[:en:1733|1733]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ) – [[:en:Sugita Genpaku|Sugita Genpaku]] , a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rangaku|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 蘭方医学|1=Rampō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11625254}} physician (+ [[:en:1817|1817]] ).
== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Julian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshihiro Muneyuki|1=Yoshihiro Muneyuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10917146}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1564|1564]] ).
== Commemorations ==
* {{ill|Jūsan'ya|ja|十三夜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūsan'ya|1=Thirteenth Night|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18988720}} (Thirteenth Night)

* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zongzhang (era)|1=Zongzhang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5154353}} 1 / [[:en:Munmu of Silla|Munmu of Silla]] 8 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:668|668]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The [[:en:Tang dynasty|Tang dynasty]] and [[:en:Silla|Silla]] forces conquer [[:en:Goguryeo|Goguryeo]] , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Korean Peninsula|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Korean Peninsula|WD=Q483134}} .
* [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ) – [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] moves from [[:en:Osaka Castle|Osaka Castle]] to [[:en:Jurakudai|Jurakudai]] in Kyoto.
* [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]] ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Battle of Ishigakibaru|1=Battle of Ishigakibaru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585393}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian [[:en:1609|1609]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ) – [[:en:Maeda Toshinaga|Maeda Toshinaga]] enters [[:en:Takaoka Castle|Takaoka Castle]] , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takaoka, Toyama|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in present-day [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]] .
== Births ==
* [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō (era)]] 18 (Gregorian [[:en:1733|1733]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ) – [[:en:Sugita Genpaku|Sugita Genpaku]] , a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rangaku|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 蘭方医学|1=Rampō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11625254}} physician (+ [[:en:1817|1817]] ).
== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Julian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshihiro Muneyuki|1=Yoshihiro Muneyuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10917146}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1564|1564]] ).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zongzhang (era)|1=Zongzhang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5154353}} 1 / [[:en:Munmu of Silla|Munmu of Silla]] 8 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:668|668]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The [[:en:Tang dynasty|Tang dynasty]] and [[:en:Silla|Silla]] forces conquer [[:en:Goguryeo|Goguryeo]] , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Korean Peninsula|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Korean Peninsula|WD=Q483134}} .
* [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ) – [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] moves from [[:en:Osaka Castle|Osaka Castle]] to [[:en:Jurakudai|Jurakudai]] in Kyoto.
* [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]] ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Battle of Ishigakibaru|1=Battle of Ishigakibaru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585393}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian [[:en:1609|1609]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ) – [[:en:Maeda Toshinaga|Maeda Toshinaga]] enters [[:en:Takaoka Castle|Takaoka Castle]] , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takaoka, Toyama|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in present-day [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]] .
== Births ==
* [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō (era)]] 18 (Gregorian [[:en:1733|1733]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ) – [[:en:Sugita Genpaku|Sugita Genpaku]] , a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rangaku|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 蘭方医学|1=Rampō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11625254}} physician (+ [[:en:1817|1817]] ).
== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Julian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshihiro Muneyuki|1=Yoshihiro Muneyuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10917146}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1564|1564]] ).
== Commemorations ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zongzhang (era)|1=Zongzhang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5154353}} 1 / [[:en:Munmu of Silla|Munmu of Silla]] 8 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:668|668]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – The [[:en:Tang dynasty|Tang dynasty]] and [[:en:Silla|Silla]] forces conquer [[:en:Goguryeo|Goguryeo]] , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Korean Peninsula|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Korean Peninsula|WD=Q483134}} .
* [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ) – [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] moves from [[:en:Osaka Castle|Osaka Castle]] to [[:en:Jurakudai|Jurakudai]] in Kyoto.
* [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]] ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Battle of Ishigakibaru|1=Battle of Ishigakibaru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585393}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian [[:en:1609|1609]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ) – [[:en:Maeda Toshinaga|Maeda Toshinaga]] enters [[:en:Takaoka Castle|Takaoka Castle]] , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takaoka, Toyama|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in present-day [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]] .
== Births ==
* [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō (era)]] 18 (Gregorian [[:en:1733|1733]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ) – [[:en:Sugita Genpaku|Sugita Genpaku]] , a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rangaku|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 蘭方医学|1=Rampō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11625254}} physician (+ [[:en:1817|1817]] ).
== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Julian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshihiro Muneyuki|1=Yoshihiro Muneyuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10917146}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1564|1564]] ).
== Commemorations ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十三]][[zh:九月十三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十三]][[zh:九月十三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十三]][[zh:九月十三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840131]] Wikidata name: 13th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 13|qq=September 13}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zongzhang (era)|1=Zongzhang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5154353}} 1 / {{ill|Munmu of Silla|en|Munmu of Silla|WD=Q494532|lt=Munmu of Silla}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|668|en|668|WD=Q30116|lt=668}} {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23}} ) – The {{ill|Tang dynasty|en|Tang dynasty|WD=Q9683|lt=Tang dynasty}} and {{ill|Silla|en|Silla|WD=Q28456|lt=Silla}} forces conquer {{ill|Goguryeo|en|Goguryeo|WD=Q28370|lt=Goguryeo}} , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Korean Peninsula|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Korean Peninsula|WD=Q483134}} .
* {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 15 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1587|en|1587|WD=Q6744|lt=1587}} {{ill|October 14|en|October 14|WD=Q2922|lt=October 14}} ) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|WD=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} moves from {{ill|Osaka Castle|en|Osaka Castle|WD=Q321242|lt=Osaka Castle}} to {{ill|Jurakudai|en|Jurakudai|WD=Q910041|lt=Jurakudai}} in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600}} {{ill|October 19|en|October 19|WD=Q2961|lt=October 19}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Battle of Ishigakibaru|1=Battle of Ishigakibaru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585393}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1609|en|1609|WD=Q6762|lt=1609}} {{ill|October 10|en|October 10|WD=Q2921|lt=October 10}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|en|Maeda Toshinaga|WD=Q1186742|lt=Maeda Toshinaga}} enters {{ill|Takaoka Castle|en|Takaoka Castle|WD=Q8011764|lt=Takaoka Castle}} , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takaoka, Toyama|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in present-day {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|en|Toyama Prefecture|WD=Q132929|lt=Toyama Prefecture}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō (era)}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1733|en|1733|WD=Q6972|lt=1733}} {{ill|October 20|en|October 20|WD=Q2959|lt=October 20}} ) – {{ill|Sugita Genpaku|en|Sugita Genpaku|WD=Q1385286|lt=Sugita Genpaku}} , a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rangaku|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 蘭方医学|1=Rampō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11625254}} physician (+ {{ill|1817|en|1817|WD=Q6958|lt=1817}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600}} {{ill|October 9|en|October 9|WD=Q2923|lt=October 9}} ) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshihiro Muneyuki|1=Yoshihiro Muneyuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10917146}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* {{ill|1564|en|1564|WD=Q6632|lt=1564}} ).
== Commemorations ==
* {{ill|Jūsan'ya|ja|十三夜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūsan'ya|1=Thirteenth Night|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18988720}} (Thirteenth Night)

{{Not to be confused with|September 13|qq=September 13}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zongzhang (era)|1=Zongzhang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5154353}} 1 / {{ill|Munmu of Silla|en|Munmu of Silla|WD=Q494532|lt=Munmu of Silla}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|668|en|668|WD=Q30116|lt=668}} {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23}} ) – The {{ill|Tang dynasty|en|Tang dynasty|WD=Q9683|lt=Tang dynasty}} and {{ill|Silla|en|Silla|WD=Q28456|lt=Silla}} forces conquer {{ill|Goguryeo|en|Goguryeo|WD=Q28370|lt=Goguryeo}} , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Korean Peninsula|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Korean Peninsula|WD=Q483134}} .
* {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 15 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1587|en|1587|WD=Q6744|lt=1587}} {{ill|October 14|en|October 14|WD=Q2922|lt=October 14}} ) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|WD=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} moves from {{ill|Osaka Castle|en|Osaka Castle|WD=Q321242|lt=Osaka Castle}} to {{ill|Jurakudai|en|Jurakudai|WD=Q910041|lt=Jurakudai}} in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600}} {{ill|October 19|en|October 19|WD=Q2961|lt=October 19}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Battle of Ishigakibaru|1=Battle of Ishigakibaru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585393}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1609|en|1609|WD=Q6762|lt=1609}} {{ill|October 10|en|October 10|WD=Q2921|lt=October 10}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|en|Maeda Toshinaga|WD=Q1186742|lt=Maeda Toshinaga}} enters {{ill|Takaoka Castle|en|Takaoka Castle|WD=Q8011764|lt=Takaoka Castle}} , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takaoka, Toyama|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in present-day {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|en|Toyama Prefecture|WD=Q132929|lt=Toyama Prefecture}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō (era)}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1733|en|1733|WD=Q6972|lt=1733}} {{ill|October 20|en|October 20|WD=Q2959|lt=October 20}} ) – {{ill|Sugita Genpaku|en|Sugita Genpaku|WD=Q1385286|lt=Sugita Genpaku}} , a {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rangaku|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 蘭方医学|1=Rampō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11625254}} physician (+ {{ill|1817|en|1817|WD=Q6958|lt=1817}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600}} {{ill|October 9|en|October 9|WD=Q2923|lt=October 9}} ) – {{ill|Yoshihiro Muneyuki|ja|吉弘統幸|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshihiro Muneyuki|1=Yoshihiro Muneyuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10917146}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* {{ill|1564|en|1564|WD=Q6632|lt=1564}} ).
== Commemorations ==
* {{ill|Jūsan'ya|ja|十三夜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūsan'ya|1=Thirteenth Night|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18988720}} (Thirteenth Night)

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Zongzhang (era)|ja|総章|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zongzhang (era)|1=Zongzhang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5154353}} 1 / {{ill|Munmu of Silla|en|Munmu of Silla|WD=Q494532|lt=Munmu of Silla|1=Munmu of Silla}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|668|en|668|WD=Q30116|lt=668|1=668}} {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23|1=October 23}} ) – The {{ill|Tang dynasty|en|Tang dynasty|WD=Q9683|lt=Tang dynasty|1=Tang dynasty}} and {{ill|Silla|en|Silla|WD=Q28456|lt=Silla|1=Silla}} forces conquer {{ill|Goguryeo|en|Goguryeo|WD=Q28370|lt=Goguryeo|1=Goguryeo}} , unifying the {{ill|Korean Peninsula|ja|朝鮮半島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Korean Peninsula|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Korean Peninsula|WD=Q483134}} .
* {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 15 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1587|en|1587|WD=Q6744|lt=1587|1=1587}} {{ill|October 14|en|October 14|WD=Q2922|lt=October 14|1=October 14}} ) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|WD=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} moves from {{ill|Osaka Castle|en|Osaka Castle|WD=Q321242|lt=Osaka Castle|1=Osaka Castle}} to {{ill|Jurakudai|en|Jurakudai|WD=Q910041|lt=Jurakudai|1=Jurakudai}} in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600|1=1600}} {{ill|October 19|en|October 19|WD=Q2961|lt=October 19|1=October 19}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Ishigakibaru|ja|石垣原の戦い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Battle of Ishigakibaru|1=Battle of Ishigakibaru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11585393}} takes place.
* Keichō 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1609|en|1609|WD=Q6762|lt=1609|1=1609}} {{ill|October 10|en|October 10|WD=Q2921|lt=October 10|1=October 10}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|en|Maeda Toshinaga|WD=Q1186742|lt=Maeda Toshinaga|1=Maeda Toshinaga}} enters {{ill|Takaoka Castle|en|Takaoka Castle|WD=Q8011764|lt=Takaoka Castle|1=Takaoka Castle}} , founding the city of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|ja|Takaoka City|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takaoka, Toyama|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in present-day {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|en|Toyama Prefecture|WD=Q132929|lt=Toyama Prefecture|1=Toyama Prefecture}} .
